description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Components property of Atlas Documents contains an object that specifies the data components of the Atlas Document as nested properties. The Components of an Atlas Document is determined by its Type. Some Document Types have no Components, in which the object is just empty.

An Atlas Document with Components must always have all of its components properly filled according to the requirements defined by its Type Specification. Some documents have custom logic for how their Components behave, and this custom logic is specified through a special reserved component property called 'Custom'. Atlas Documents of Types with specified custom logic components can have variable number of components, and different characteristics of each component, for each instance of the Type. Custom components are always appended to the end of the list of components.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
